faq.heading: Any questions?
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our loan products and process

faqs.question: What is the loan amount range at Quikkred?
faqs.answer: Quikkred offers payday loans from ₹10,000 to ₹5,00,000. The exact amount depends on your income, credit profile, and our AI assessment.

faqs.question: What are the fees and interest rates?
faqs.answer: Interest rate is 1% per day on the loan amount. Platform fee is 10% of loan amount with 18% GST on platform fee. Example: For ₹50,000 loan - Platform Fee ₹5,000 + GST ₹900 + Interest ₹500 = ₹6,400 deducted. You receive ₹43,600 and repay ₹50,000.

faqs.question: How quickly can I get approved?
faqs.answer: With our AI-powered system, loan approval takes just 30 seconds! Once approved, money is disbursed to your bank account within 30 minutes during banking hours.

faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria?
faqs.answer: You must be an Indian citizen aged 21-60 years, have minimum monthly income of ₹15,000, be employed (salaried or self-employed), and have a valid bank account with PAN and Aadhaar.

faqs.question: What loan tenures are available?
faqs.answer: We offer flexible tenures of 7, 15, 30, 60, or 90 days. You can repay anytime without prepayment penalty.

faqs.question: Is Quikkred RBI registered?
faqs.answer: Yes, Quikkred is powered by Satsai Finlease Private Limited, an RBI registered NBFC (Registration: B-14.01646). Your data is protected with bank-level security.

hero.title: About Quikkred
hero.subtitle: We are India's most trusted AI-powered NBFC, committed to making credit accessible, affordable, and transparent for every Indian. Our mission is to empower dreams and enable financial inclusion through technology and trust.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: QuikKred began in 2018 as a leading RBI-registered NBFC with a clear goal: to build a seamless lending experience for the underserved population of India. We recognized that millions of individuals and small businesses were excluded from traditional financial systems, facing complex processes and limited access to credit.
story.paragraph2: We saw the challenges many faced with traditional financing and knew that by leveraging cutting-edge technology, we could offer accessible and fair loan products. Our digital-first approach removes barriers, simplifies the lending process, and empowers individuals to achieve their financial goals with dignity and ease.
story.paragraph3: Today, we continue to innovate and expand, staying true to our mission of making financial services accessible to everyone who needs them.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.paragraph1: To be India's most trusted and preferred digital lending platform, empowering millions to achieve their financial aspirations.
vision.paragraph2: We see a future where everyone has the financial tools they need to build a secure and prosperous life.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To make our vision a reality, we are on a mission to:
features: Provide innovative, accessible, and responsible lending solutions.
Leverage technology for a seamless customer experience.
Foster financial inclusion across all of India.

values.title: What We
values.subtitle: Our values guide every decision we make and every interaction we have

customerFirst.title: Customer First
customerFirst.description: We are committed to understanding and meeting our customers' needs with empathy and dedication.

integrity.title: Integrity & Transparency
integrity.description: We uphold the highest standards of honesty and clarity in all our dealings.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.description: We are dedicated to responsible lending practices that prioritize our customers' long-term financial well-being.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously innovate to simplify processes and deliver superior financial solutions.

inclusivity.title: Inclusivity
inclusivity.description: We strive to make credit accessible to all, promoting financial inclusion across communities.

socialImpact.title: Social Impact
socialImpact.description: We aim to create a positive social impact by empowering our communities and driving economic growth.
